title: eucalyptus subangusta subsp. subangusta
intro: Eucalyptus subangusta subsp. subangusta, a subspecies of the eucalyptus plant native to Australia, is a small to medium-sized tree or shrub characterized by its narrow, lance-shaped leaves and fragrant, silvery-blue foliage. The medicinal properties of this plant include its ability to act as an expectorant, helping to relieve congestion and coughs, as well as its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Eucalyptus subangusta subsp. subangusta include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. Eucalyptus subangusta subsp. subangusta is often used in herbal preparations such as tea, oil, and salves, which can be applied topically to soothe skin irritations and respiratory issues.
